modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Zoom through D2L due to an error.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to hop into my Zoom class through D2L, you know, the usual routine. But then, out of nowhere, I got this weird error message saying, "Warning The instructor's email() is invalid(2216)." It totally threw me off because I really needed to join the session, and now I'm stuck. I just can't figure out why this is happening, and it's super frustrating!
